_publications._publicationTitle: Testing ATRA and MEK inhibitor PD0325901 effectiveness in a nude mouse model for human MPNST xenografts.

_contextSnippet: colony formation assays were performed and yielded 42 ± 6 colonies of T265 cells and 21 ± 5 colonies of S462 cells from 300 cells plated
details: Colony formation assay yielded 21 ± 5 colonies from 300 cells plated
